sections.paragraph:
fut. יֶאֱנַף to breathe, also to emit breath through the nostrils, as a verb only figuratively, to be angry (compare הֵפִיחַ Psa 10:5). Const. either absol. Psa 2:12 60:3 79:5 or with בְּ of object, Isa 12:1 1Ki 8:46 Psa 85:6. It is only used in loftier and poetic language; in prose there is used-

Hithpael, prop. to show oneself angry, hence i.q. Kal; construed with בְּ, Deu 1:37 4:21 9:8 , 20 .

Derivat. אַף No. II.
